messages.author: willmartin
messages.text: Hi I'm Will, founder of DC Mesh - we're a club here in DC that's deploying solar powered mesh hardware. We have in-person meetings every 3 months. Prior to this I founded Austin Mesh - a group with one of the largest Meshtastic meshes running now. So far DC mesh has been running Meshtastic but as of today we now have a meshcore router running in the Cleveland Park neighborhood of Washington DC. (edited)
messages.content_html: Hi I'm Will, founder of DC Mesh - we're a club here in DC that's deploying solar powered mesh hardware. We have in-person meetings every 3 months. messages.author: Fidonet127
messages.text: I'm working on getting a decent repeater setup here in the Fredericksburg area. should I be part of this group, or create a different group?

messages.author: willmartin
messages.text: Either way - it's say join for now - we're still trying to get just two nodes meshed up halfway across town
